pageContext.name: Leon S. Kennedy (Classic Version)
pageContext.description: NAUTS and DAMTOYS are proud to team up to deliver the Leon S. Kennedy (Classic Version) Sixth Scale Collectible Figure from the popular CAPCOM game RESIDENT EVIL 2!  This Classic edition of Leon features a highly detailed and posable body with over 30 points of articulation, allowing fans to recreate their favorite moments from the cult-classic survival horror game. A fully fabricated RPD uniform and an unbelievable array of weapons and accessories make this one video game figure you don't want to miss out on!  Resident Evil fans, try to escape Raccoon city with the help of Leon S. Kennedy, and add to your collection today!
